item.text: I’ll replace the placeholder with a diagonal-set proof and test it with TLAPS.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: Cantor1_cantor.tla
@@
 THEOREM cantor ==
   \\A S :
     \\A f \\in [S -> SUBSET S] :
       \\E A \\in SUBSET S :
         \\A x \\in S :
           f [x] # A
-PROOF OBVIOUS
+PROOF
+<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW S, NEW f \\in [S -> SUBSET S]
+      PROVE \\E A \\in SUBSET S : \\A x \\in S : f[x] # A
+  OBVIOUS
+<1>2. DEFINE A == {x \\in S : x \\notin f[x]}
+<1>3. A \\in SUBSET S
+  OBVIOUS
+<1>4. \\A x \\in S : f[x] # A
+  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x \\in S
+        PROVE f[x] # A
+    OBVIOUS
+  <2>2. x \\in A <=> x \\notin f[x]
+    BY <1>2 DEF A
+  <2>3. f[x] # A
+    BY <2>2
+  <2> QED BY <2>3
+<1> QED BY <1>3, <1>4
 
 ===============================================
*** End Patch
PATCH
~/.tlapm15/bin/tlapm -I ~/.tlapm15/lib/tlaps Cantor1_cantor.tla"
